Sandbox_BCR_BodyCount_tooltip: How many zombie kills before earning a reward. <LINE><LINE> <RGB:0.6,1.0,0.2> Lower = Faster rewards <LINE> <RGB:1.0,0.6,0.2> Higher = Slower rewards
Sandbox_BCR_enablePositiveTraits_tooltip: Allow earning positive traits as rewards. <LINE><LINE> <RGB:0.8,0.8,0.8> Default: Enabled
Sandbox_BCR_enableNegativeTraits_tooltip: Allow removing negative traits as rewards. <LINE><LINE> <RGB:0.8,0.8,0.8> Default: Disabled
Sandbox_BCR_grantMissedOpportunities_too: Grant rewards for kills made before installing the mod. <LINE><LINE> <RGB:1.0,0.6,0.2> WARNING: High body counts may grant many rewards at once! <LINE><LINE> <RGB:0.8,0.8,0.8> Default: Disabled
Sandbox_BCR_rewardPriority_tooltip: What comes first when you hit a milestone? <LINE><LINE> <RGB:0.6,1.0,0.2> Gain First: Earn positive traits before removing negative ones <LINE> <RGB:1.0,0.6,0.2> Lose First: Remove negative traits before gaining positive ones <LINE> <RGB:0.8,0.3,1.0> Random: Keep things spicy!
Sandbox_BCR_MilestoneScaling_tooltip: How the kill requirement grows between milestones. <LINE><LINE> <RGB:0.5,0.8,1.0> __________________________ <LINE> <RGB:1.0,0.85,0.4> LINEAR (BodyCount = 1,000): <LINE> <RGB:0.8,0.8,0.8>   Milestone #1  = 1,000 <LINE>   Milestone #2  = 2,000 <LINE>   Milestone #3  = 3,000 <LINE>   Milestone #5  = 5,000 <LINE>   Milestone #10 = 10,000 <LINE><LINE> <RGB:0.6,1.0,0.2> PROGRESSIVE x1.0 (BodyCount = 1,000): <LINE> <RGB:0.8,0.8,0.8>   Milestone #1  = 1,000 <LINE>   Milestone #2  = 3,000 <LINE>   Milestone #3  = 6,000 <LINE>   Milestone #5  = 15,000 <LINE>   Milestone #10 = 55,000 <LINE> <RGB:0.5,0.8,1.0> __________________________
Sandbox_BCR_enableDebugLogging_tooltip: Prints detailed BodyCountRewards information to the console for troubleshooting. <LINE><LINE> <RGB:1.0,0.6,0.2> Intended for debugging only. <LINE><LINE> <RGB:0.8,0.8,0.8> Default: Disabled
